name: electron-builder
description: Complete solution to package and build ready-for-distribution Electron, Proton, and general Node.js apps.

seo.title: electron-builder — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: electron-builder: Complete solution to package and build ready-for-distribution Electron, Proton, and general Node.js apps.

when_to_use: Package Electron apps for Windows, macOS, and Linux CI
Build NSIS, DMG, AppImage, and deb from one config
Publish release artifacts to GitHub Releases or S3

pros: One tool handles Win, macOS, Linux packaging
Built-in code signing and notarization flows
Large community and many real-world configs
cons: Configuration surface is huge and confusing
Maintenance pace has slowed in recent years
review.verdict: The default for serious Electron distribution, if you can stomach its config complexity.
review.best_for: Established Electron apps needing full control over installers and signing.
review.not_for: Newcomers who will be happier starting with electron-forge.
